sn51.30:1.1:
1
Atha kho sambahulā bhikkhū yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu … pe … ekamantaṁ nisinne kho te bhikkhū bhagavā etadavoca: "katamā nu kho, bhikkhave, iddhi, katamo iddhipādo, katamā iddhi pāda bhāvanā, katamā iddhi pāda bhāvanāgāminī paṭipadā"ti? "Bhagavaṁmūlakā no, bhante, dhammā bhagavaṁnettikā … pe … .
